description: Coppermine Photo Gallery 1.2.2b and 1.2.0 RC4 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information via a direct HTTP request to (1) phpinfo.php, (2) addpic.php, (3) config.php, (4) db_input.php, (5) displayecard.php, (6) ecard.php, (7) crop.inc.php, which reveal the full path in a PHP error message.
